about.title: About Abdalla Eye Clinic
about.mission_text: At Abdalla Eye Clinic, our mission is to deliver exceptional ophthalmology care with clinical precision, compassion, and clear guidance, helping every patient protect their vision and long-term eye health.
about.vision_text: Our vision is to be Alexandria's trusted destination for premium eye care, combining advanced diagnostics, refined treatment planning, and a patient experience built on confidence and continuity.
